reference: Hi, I have just had an ultrasound and have a thirteen millimeter hyperechoic focus in the mid-pole region of my right kidney. What does this mean? I am thirty-one, one hundred and fifty-four centimeters tall, and weigh one hundred and seven kilograms. I had a hysterectomy earlier this year and have not been able to pass urine since because of a hematoma the size of a grapefruit post-surgery. I have a catheter in at present and I have had a large volume of blood in my urine, as well as clots and recurrent Escherichia coli and Pseudomonas urinary tract infections.
text: Hi, I have just had an ultrasound and have a thirteen millimeter hypercoagulat focus in the mid pole region of my right kidney. What does this mean? I am thirty-one, one hundred and fifty-four centimeters tall and weigh one hundred and seven kilograms. I had a hysterectomy earlier this year and have not been able to pass urine since because of a hematom on the size of a grapefruit post surgery. I have a catheter in at present and I have had a large volume of blood in my urine as well as coughs and recurrent Escherichia coli and pseudomonas urinary tract infections.
